message:
fix: Prevent integer overflow and unbounded paste buffer growth

- Use saturating_mul in OptimizedBuffer::new() and resize() to prevent
  overflow when width * height exceeds u32::MAX
- Use saturating_mul in HitGrid::new() and resize() for same reason
- Add MAX_PASTE_BUFFER_SIZE (10MB) limit to InputParser to prevent DoS
  from malformed/malicious paste mode sequences

All changes pass cargo check, clippy, and tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
